raw_consumer_statement:
On or about XX/XX/XXXX I logged in to my Macy 's app to search for shoes. After my purchase, I checked statement balance only to realize there was a charge for {$660.00} posted on XX/XX/XXXX. 
I immediately placed an online dispute and requested to be sent a new Macy 's American Express card. A few minutes later, I decided to call customer service and inform them about the charge from XX/XX/XXXX. 
I proceeded to ask questions about the purchase and the customer service rep. confirmed it was an *in person purchase and could not provide any other information at that time. Again, I stated I had not made the purchase to which they answered : they would need 1-2 billing cycles to investigate and I would receive a new card in the mail, and that no charges would be expected during this time. 

I have made numerous calls since XXXX to the present date to followup on my initial call and monitor the status of dispute, only to get in bits and pieces at every phone call about the details of this unauthorized purchase that are contradictory and and make no sense ( at best ) : I was told by customer service rep. XXXX, on XX/XX/XXXX, that the purchase amount of {$660.00} was removed on XX/XX/XXXX and then added back on to my account based on the the fact the dispute had been denied/closed. 
I was also informed on this date the charge is for a full size foam mattresses with two pillows that had been *purchased on XX/XX/XXXX but it had not posted until XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX and therefore I had not satisfied the payment. 

At this news, I expressed being baffled, confused and angry at this situation that has affected my life and we'll as my credit score! And yet again, I was transferred to another person to *reinstate a dispute over the same issue* while none of it makes sense. 
As I am waiting for this to come to a resolution I am in receipt of a letter from Macy 's with the denial denial of my first dispute filed on XX/XX/XXXX and have not yet received any of the statements I asked for as proof of purchase because according to Macy 's : " They are not able to provide me with copies of billing statements from XXXX. '' Please help! 

XXXX XXXX XXXX
